ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tweet was created */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who posted the tweet */,
  "geo" TEXT /* Geolocation of the tweet (if available) */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the tweet received */,
  "impression_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet was displayed to users */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies the tweet received */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets the tweet received */,
  "tweet_text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the tweet (API, web scraping, manual upload) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the tweet belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the tweet belongs to */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "is_retweet" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the tweet is a retweet */,
  "retweet_of_tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original tweet if it is a retweet */,
  "quote_of_tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quoted tweet if it is a quote tweet */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the author has */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of accounts the author follows */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the author is verified */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the author's profile image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the author's account was created */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date and time of the author's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag_text" TEXT /* Text content of the hashtag */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Score indicating the popularity of the hashtag */,
  "first_used" TEXT /* Date and time the hashtag was first used */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Date and time the hashtag was last used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_hashtags" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag used in the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "mention_text" TEXT /* Text content of the mention */,
  "mentioned_author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author mentioned */,
  "first_mentioned" TEXT /* Date and time the mention was first used */,
  "last_mentioned" TEXT /* Date and time the mention was last used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_mentions" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mention in the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "mention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL */,
  "url_text" TEXT /* Text content of the URL */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain of the URL */,
  "click_count" INTEGER /* Number of clicks the URL has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_urls" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "url_id" INTEGER /* ID of the URL in the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "url_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the image */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the image */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* File size of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_images" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image in the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the video */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* File size of the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_videos" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video in the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object of user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics event */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being analyzed */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score of the tweet */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the tweet */,
  "impression_count" INTEGER /* Number of impressions the tweet received */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the tweet received */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies the tweet received */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets the tweet received */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analytics record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_topics" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the tweet belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the topic was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topic_categories" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the topic belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
